buildCommand: npx convex deploy --cmd 'npm run build' || (echo '⚠ convex deploy failed (missing/expired CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY, or missing CLERK_JWT_ISSUER_DOMAIN in the Convex env) — building the frontend only against NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL. A genuine code/build error would fail here too.' && node scripts/gen-generated.mjs && npm run build)
